| Field | Value (with section reference) |
|---|---|
| Issuer | Nordhavn Industri AB (publ), a Swedish public limited liability company. *Indicative Terms* |
| Guarantors (if any) | Nordhavn Group AB (parent); each material subsidiary representing >5% of group EBITDA or assets, tested iteratively at each interest payment date. *Indicative Terms* |
| Instrument type | Senior secured callable floating rate notes due 2031. *Indicative Terms — Senior Secured Floating Rate Notes due 2031* |
| Principal amount | Initial principal amount: SEK 1,500,000,000. Framework amount: SEK 2,500,000,000, allowing up to SEK 1,000m of subsequent tap issues subject to incurrence test. *Indicative Terms* |
| Coupon | Floating: 3-month STIBOR, subject to 0.00% floor, plus 4.75% p.a. margin. *Indicative Terms* |
| Tenor / maturity date | 5 years, NC2; maturity 12 June 2031. *Indicative Terms* |
| Issue price | 100.000%. *Indicative Terms* |
| Use of proceeds | Refinance existing SEK 1,250m senior secured notes 2022/2027 in full, with remainder for general corporate purposes including potential bolt-on acquisitions. *Indicative Terms* |
| Optional redemption schedule | Before 12 June 2028: make-whole call at T+50bps; 12 June 2028 to 11 June 2029: 102.375%; 12 June 2029 to 11 June 2030: 101.188%; from 12 June 2030: 100.000%. Equity claw before 12 June 2028 for up to 35% at 104.75%. *Optional redemption* |
| Change-of-control provision | Noteholder put at 101% of principal plus accrued interest upon CoC. CoC threshold: any person or concert group, excluding existing controlling shareholders, acquiring more than 50% of voting rights in Nordhavn Group AB. *Covenant package — Change of control* |
| Incurrence covenant test | Net Interest-Bearing Debt / EBITDA must be no greater than 3.50x on or before the second anniversary of issue date, and 3.25x thereafter. *Covenant package — Incurrence covenants* |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Restricted payments permitted if no default, pro forma Net Interest-Bearing Debt / EBITDA is no greater than 3.00x, and aggregate RP does not exceed 50% of consolidated net income since issue date plus SEK 50m starter basket. *Covenant package — Restricted payments* |
| Negative pledge headline | No security over assets except permitted security; general basket for other security up to SEK 75m in aggregate. *Covenant package — Negative pledge* |
| Trustee / paying agent | Trustee / Security Agent: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ). Paying agent: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB (publ). *Indicative Terms* |
| Listing exchange | Corporate Bond List of Nasdaq Stockholm, with admission to trading within 60 days of issue date. *Indicative Terms* |
| Governing law | Swedish law. *Indicative Terms; Security package* |

| Field | Value (with section reference) |
|---|---|
| Issuer | Fjordkraft Energi Holding AS, a Norwegian private limited liability company. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Issuer. |
| Guarantors (if any) | None at issuance; issuer must procure an upstream guarantee within 90 days from any future acquired/established subsidiary representing more than 10% of group EBITDA. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Guarantors. |
| Instrument type | Senior unsecured floating rate notes, marketed under the Green Bond Framework. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Instrument. |
| Principal amount | Initial principal amount: EUR 250,000,000. Framework amount: EUR 500,000,000, with taps permitted subject to incurrence test. Source: “Indicative Terms” table. |
| Coupon | Floating: 3-month EURIBOR, subject to 0.00% floor, + 3.25% per annum margin. 25 bps margin step-up if Sustainalytics ESG rating falls below “Medium Risk,” subject to cure. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Interest rate / Step-up provision. |
| Tenor / maturity date | 4 years, NC1; maturity 18 September 2030. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Tenor. |
| Issue price | 100.000%. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Issue price. |
| Use of proceeds | Refinancing existing EUR 200m senior unsecured notes 2022/2027 and financing/refinancing Eligible Green Projects including wind, transmission assets and green hydrogen electrolyser capacity. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Use of proceeds. |
| Optional redemption schedule | Before 18 September 2027: make-whole call, Bund yield + 50 bps; 18 September 2027 to 17 September 2028: 103.000%; 18 September 2028 to 17 September 2029: 101.500%; from 18 September 2029: 100.000%, increased to 100.500% if emissions-reduction target is missed. Equity claw: none. Source: “Optional redemption” section. |
| Change-of-control provision | Noteholder put at 101% plus accrued interest. Change of control threshold: any person/group, excluding specified existing controllers, pension funds or sovereign wealth funds, acquiring more than 50% of voting rights. Source: “Covenant package - Change of control.” |
| Incurrence covenant test | Additional debt permitted only if, pro forma, Net Debt / EBITDA is no greater than 5.00x and Net Debt / RCF is no greater than 6.50x. Source: “Covenant package - Incurrence covenants.” |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Restricted payments permitted if no default, pro forma Net Debt / EBITDA no greater than 4.25x, and aggregate restricted payments do not exceed EUR 25m starter basket plus 50% of consolidated net income since issue date. Source: “Covenant package - Restricted payments.” |
| Negative pledge headline | Issuer and Material Subsidiaries may not grant security over assets to secure financial indebtedness, subject to carve-outs including project SPV security, existing security, ordinary-course security and a EUR 30m general basket. Source: “Covenant package - Negative pledge.” |
| Trustee / paying agent | Bond Trustee: Nordic Trustee AS. Paying agent: Nordic Trustee AS. Source: “Indicative Terms” table. |
| Listing exchange | Oslo Børs ABM, Sustainable Bond segment. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Listing. |
| Governing law | Norwegian law. Source: “Indicative Terms” table, Governing law. |

| Guarantors | Karelis Property Holding A/S, parent; all wholly-owned propco subsidiaries of the Issuer, subject to carve-outs for SPVs with ring-fenced mortgage debt. `Indicative Terms` |

| Coupon | Floating: 3-month EURIBOR, subject to 0.00% floor, plus 4.25% per annum margin. `Indicative Terms` |
| Tenor / maturity date | 5 years, NC2; maturity 5 November 2031. `Indicative Terms` |
| Issue price | 100.000%. `Indicative Terms` |
| Use of proceeds | Refinancing EUR 285m of secured bank facilities, acquisition of logistics properties for about EUR 95m, and general corporate purposes. `Indicative Terms` |
| Optional redemption schedule | Before 5 November 2028: make-whole at Bund yield + 50 bps; 5 Nov 2028-4 Nov 2029: 102.125%; 5 Nov 2029-4 Nov 2030: 101.063%; from 5 Nov 2030: 100.000%; equity claw up to 40% at 104.25% before 5 Nov 2028; tax call at par plus accrued. `Optional redemption` |
| Change-of-control provision | Put at 101% plus accrued interest. CoC includes acquisition by any person/group of more than 50% of voting rights in Karelis Property Holding A/S or the Issuer, or existing controlling shareholder ceasing to hold at least 30%. `Change of control` |
| Incurrence covenant test | Additional indebtedness only if pro forma LTV <= 55%, Secured LTV <= 45%, and Net ICR >= 1.75x. `Covenant package - Financial covenants` |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Restricted payments require no default, LTV <= 50%, ICR >= 2.00x, and cap of EUR 15m starter basket plus 50% of consolidated FFO since issue date. `Restricted payments` |
| Negative pledge headline | Standard real-estate negative pledge with carve-outs for permitted propco mortgage security, ordinary-course statutory/account security, and EUR 20m general basket. `Negative pledge` |
| Trustee / paying agent | Trustee / Security Agent: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ); Paying agent: Danske Bank A/S. `Indicative Terms` |
| Listing exchange | Nasdaq Copenhagen, Corporate Bonds segment. `Indicative Terms` |
| Governing law | Danish law, with Swedish law security documents for Swedish-situated properties. `Indicative Terms` |

Source checked: SEC 424B5 prospectus supplement dated August 7, 2024.

| Field | Value (with section reference) |

| Issuer | HCA Inc. (`Summary - The Offering - Issuer`; `Description of the Notes`) |
| Guarantors (if any) | HCA Healthcare, Inc., parent guarantor, fully and unconditionally guarantees the notes on a senior unsecured basis. (`Summary - Parent Guarantee`; `Description of the Notes - Parent Guarantee`) |
| Instrument type | Senior Notes; unsecured senior obligations of HCA Inc. (`Cover Page`; `Description of the Notes - Ranking of Notes and Parent Guarantee`) |
| Principal amount | $750,000,000 5.450% Senior Notes due 2031; $1,250,000,000 5.450% Senior Notes due 2034; $1,000,000,000 5.950% Senior Notes due 2054. New 2031 notes are additional notes; total 2031 series becomes $1,750,000,000. (`Summary - Notes`; `Description of the Notes - Principal, Maturity and Interest`) |
| Coupon | Fixed: 5.450% p.a. for 2031 notes; 5.450% p.a. for 2034 notes; 5.950% p.a. for 2054 notes. (`Summary - Interest Rate`; `Description of the Notes - Principal, Maturity and Interest`) |
| Tenor / maturity date | 2031 notes mature April 1, 2031; 2034 notes mature September 15, 2034; 2054 notes mature September 15, 2054. (`Summary - Maturity Date`; `Description of the Notes - Principal, Maturity and Interest`) |
| Issue price | 2031 notes: 101.864% plus accrued interest; 2034 notes: 99.854%; 2054 notes: 99.935%. (`Cover Page - Public offering price table`) |
| Use of proceeds | Net proceeds for general corporate purposes, which may include repayment of borrowings under the ABL credit facility. (`Use of Proceeds`) |
| Optional redemption schedule | Redeemable at any time. Before par call: greater of make-whole at Treasury Rate + 20 bps for 2031, +25 bps for 2034, +30 bps for 2054, and 100%, plus accrued interest. Par calls: 2031 on/after February 1, 2031; 2034 on/after June 15, 2034; 2054 on/after March 15, 2054, each at 100% plus accrued interest. (`Description of the Notes - Optional Redemption`) |
| Change-of-control provision | Upon a Change of Control Triggering Event, holders may require repurchase at 101% of principal plus accrued and unpaid interest. Trigger requires both a Change of Control and Below Investment Grade Rating Event; CoC includes sale of substantially all assets or acquisition by a non-permitted holder of 50%+ voting power. (`Summary - Change of Control Triggering Event`; `Description of the Notes - Repurchase at the Option of Holders - Change of Control Triggering Event`; `Certain Definitions`) |
| Incurrence covenant test | NOT STATED for the notes. The note covenant section states no general restriction on incurring indebtedness, except mortgage/equal-and-ratable secured-debt limits. Separate senior secured credit facilities have maintenance covenants, including max total net leverage of 6.75:1.00. (`Description of the Notes - Limitations on Mortgages`; `Description of Other Indebtedness - Certain Covenants and Events of Default`) |
| Restricted payments basket headline | NOT STATED for the notes. The described note covenants cover liens/mortgages, sale-leasebacks and merger/assets provisions, not a restricted payments basket. (`Summary - Covenants`; `Description of the Notes - Certain Covenants`) |
| Negative pledge headline | Limitation on mortgages over Principal Property: HCA Inc. and subsidiaries may not secure indebtedness by mortgages on Principal Property unless the notes are equally and ratably secured, subject to permitted exceptions; general carve-out for non-permitted secured debt/sale-leasebacks up to 15% of Consolidated Total Assets. (`Description of the Notes - Limitations on Mortgages`; `Exempted Transactions`) |
| Trustee / paying agent | CSC Delaware Trust Company, as successor to Law Debenture Trust Company of New York, trustee; Deutsche Bank Trust Company Americas, paying agent, registrar and transfer agent. (`Description of the Notes`; `Certain Definitions - Base Indenture`) |
| Listing exchange | NOT STATED. The document states no current public trading market for the 2034/2054 notes and possible no continuing market for the 2031 notes, but does not state an exchange listing. (`Summary - No Public Market`; `Underwriting`) |
| Governing law | New York law. (`Description of the Notes - Governing Law`) |
